name: debate protocol: DebateVerdict schema validation (positive + negative cases)
description: Unit-tests validateDebateVerdict directly. Positive: a complete well-formed verdict must pass with valid:true and no errors. Negative-1: missing required 'basis' field must fail. Negative-2: verdict value not in VERDICT_ENUM must fail. Also verifies VERDICT_ENUM contains AGREE and ARBITRATED but not INVALID.
